name: mc_rng_seeding_standard_inputs
description: Standard 50-day history used for all RNG seeding reproducibility tests. Holdings, history spec, and call params are fixed; mc_prob is NEVER hardcoded — tests assert two independent runs with the same seed agree with each other (not against a literal).
notes: PA-18: expected field intentionally absent — reproducibility is asserted as run_a == run_b. Any field named 'expected' here would be a producer-computed literal and a PA-18 violation.
derivation: 50 days > MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS=20; full MC path runs. last_percent_change=0.0 for all holdings so current_symphony_return=0 (mid-distribution). spy_today_return=0.0 so kNN selects neutral-return days that split ~50% above and ~50% below csr=0, preventing saturation to 0.0 or 100.0. explicit_seed and seed_b are arbitrary — their values are not producer outputs. seed_b != seed_a to test that distinct seeds drive distinct random draws.
